publications.title: Building Refactoring Tools: Insights from RefactorEx
publications.booktitle: 1st Workshop on Software Engineering for Functional Programming (SE4FP)
publications.abstract: This paper presents insights gained from developing RefactorEx, a refactoring tool for the Elixir functional language.

publications.title: Towards a Catalog of Refactorings for Elixir
publications.booktitle: 39th International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution (ICSME)
publications.abstract: This paper presents the first specialized catalog of refactoring strategies for Elixir, identifying 54 techniques through a systematic literature review and illustrating each refactoring with code transformation examples.

publications.title: Code Smells and Refactorings for Elixir
publications.booktitle: Concurso de Teses e Dissertações em Engenharia de Software (Doutorado) - Congresso Brasileiro de Software: Teoria e Prática (CBSoft) - 1st place!
publications.abstract: This thesis presents an empirical investigation of Elixir-specific code smells and refactorings, cataloging 35 code smells and 82 refactorings and establishing practical guidelines for disciplined smell removal.

publications.title: Democracia em Xeque: Um Estudo Comparativo sobre Detecção de Code Smells
publications.booktitle: 10th Workshop on Software Visualization, Maintenance and Evolution (VEM)
publications.abstract: This paper presents a quantitative evaluation of three automated code smell detection tools and a voting-based approach, comparing their results against an expert-defined oracle for the God Class smell.

publications.title: SEEstem Wearable navigation device for people with visual impairments
publications.booktitle: 37th Education and Research in Computer Aided Architectural Design in Europe (eCAADe) and 23rd Iberoamerican Society of Digital Graphics (SIGraDi)
publications.abstract: This paper presents a wearable assistive device that integrates smartphone technologies and Arduino microcontrollers to support orientation and obstacle detection, aiming to improve the urban mobility and independence of visually impaired people.

publications.title: Development of a Framework to Improve the use of Mobile Devices by the Elderly
publications.abstract: This paper presents a framework that helps developers create mobile application interfaces tailored to the needs of older adults, based on strategies derived from a user study.

publications.title: ClickOnMap: A platform for development of Volunteered Geographic Information systems
publications.booktitle: 12th Iberian Conference on Information Systems and Technologies (CISTI)
publications.abstract: This paper presents ClickOnMap, a platform for rapidly developing Volunteered Geographic Information (VGI) systems with support for data quality and real-time mobile collaboration.

publications.title: DC2AP: A Dublin Core Application Profile to Analysis Patterns
publications.booktitle: 24th International Conference on Software Engineering & Knowledge Engineering (SEKE)
publications.abstract: This paper presents DC2AP, a metadata profile for documenting analysis patterns that supports their cataloguing and reuse through the Analysis Patterns Reuse Infrastructure (APRI).

publications.title: A machine-processable dublin core application profile for analysis patterns to provide linked data
publications.booktitle: 2012 International Conference on Dublin Core and Metadata Applications (DC)
publications.abstract: This paper presents DC2AP, a metadata profile for documenting analysis patterns as RDF-based Linked Data, supporting their cataloguing, discovery, and reuse through the Analysis Patterns Reuse Infrastructure (APRI).

publications.title: An Infrastructure Oriented for Cataloging Services and Reuse of Analysis Patterns
publications.booktitle: International Workshop on Reuse in Business Process Management (rBPM)
publications.abstract: This paper presents the Analysis Patterns Reuse Infrastructure (APRI), which combines web services and a metadata representation to support the cataloguing and reuse of analysis patterns.

publications.title: ClickOnMap Mobile: Aplicativo Móvel de Coleta de Informações em Tempo Real para Múltiplos Sistemas de VGI
publications.abstract: This paper presents ClickOnMap Mobile, a mobile application for collecting and visualizing Volunteered Geographic Information (VGI) in real time through integration with ClickOnMap-based systems.

publications.title: Code smells in Elixir: early results from a grey literature review
publications.abstract: This paper presents the first catalog of code smells for Elixir, identifying 11 traditional code smells and proposing 18 Elixir-specific smells through a grey literature review, while evaluating their support in the Credo static analysis tool.

publications.title: Understanding Code Smells in Elixir Functional Language
publications.abstract: This paper introduces the first catalog of Elixir code smells and evaluates their relevance through a survey with professional developers.

publications.title: Understanding Refactorings in Elixir Functional Language
publications.abstract: This paper introduces the first catalog of Elixir refactorings and evaluates their relevance through a survey with professional developers.

publications.title: Mind the Gap: Linking Refactorings and Code Smells in Elixir
publications.journal: Journal of Software: Evolution and Process
publications.abstract: This paper presents practical guidelines for removing Elixir code smells by establishing 176 relationships between 35 code smells and 70 refactorings cataloged for the language, providing systematic support for code quality improvement.

publications.title: A Dublin core application profile for documenting analysis patterns in a reuse infrastructure
publications.journal: International Journal of Metadata, Semantics and Ontologies
publications.abstract: This paper presents DC2AP, a metadata profile designed to document analysis patterns in a machine-processable format, facilitating their cataloguing and reuse through linked data.

publications.title: Um Editor de Metadados para Documentar Padrões de Análise em uma Infraestrutura de Reuso
publications.abstract: This paper presents the DC2AP Metadata Editor, a metadata editor for documenting analysis patterns according to the DC2AP model and publishing them as linked data to facilitate their retrieval and reuse.
